headline: 5 Must-Read Analyst Questions From Nike’s Q1 Earnings Call
summary: Nike’s first quarter results for 2026 were viewed negatively by the market, as sales remained flat and operating margins fell despite meeting Wall Street’s revenue expectations. Management attributed the underwhelming performance to deliberate inventory reductions, particularly in classic footwear, and ongoing pressure from elevated promotions and tariffs. CEO Elliott J. Hill described the quarter as “not satisfactory,” but underscored progress in Nike Running and wholesale partnerships, while a
